strategic_blueprint.core_strategy: Dual-funnel architecture. The landing page acts as a cinematic hook that quickly segments traffic into three distinct interactive paths: Client, Owner, and Observer. This eliminates friction and delivers highly relevant, conversion-focused content.

segmentation_flow.trigger: After a brief, high-impact emotional hero section ('Sua Beleza. Seu Negócio. Sincronizados.'), a cinematic full-screen glassmorphism overlay activates.

typeform_style_cards.title: Quero agendar um serviço
typeform_style_cards.subtitle: Para clientes
typeform_style_cards.action: Routes to the Client Experience interactive grid.

typeform_style_cards.title: Quero gerenciar meu negócio
typeform_style_cards.subtitle: Para donos de estabelecimentos e profissionais
typeform_style_cards.action: Routes to the Owner Dashboard and ROI simulator.

typeform_style_cards.title: Estou apenas observando
typeform_style_cards.subtitle: Explorar tudo
typeform_style_cards.action: Unlocks the full linear scroll, revealing both paths with a sticky side-nav to jump between sections.

client_experience_path.execution: Display a Bento Grid of 'Featured Establishments'. When a user clicks one, an interactive split-screen or modal opens, simulating the actual CutSync mobile app experience.
client_experience_path.conversion_hook: Users can navigate the mocked service menu, choose a professional, and pick a time. The moment they click 'Confirmar Agendamento' (Confirm Booking), a polished Login/Signup gate interrupts: 'Para confirmar seu agendamento, faça parte do CutSync.' (To confirm your booking, join CutSync).

owner_experience_path.concept: Data as art and operational control.
owner_experience_path.execution: An interactive, scroll-triggered dashboard mockup section. Data must be clearly marked as MOCKADOS. Includes a toggle to switch between 'Visão do Dono' (Owner - aggregate metrics, revenue, overall calendar) and 'Visão do Profissional' (Professional - individual agenda, commissions).
owner_experience_path.interaction: Charts highlight on hover; mock notifications of 'New Booking' pop up dynamically to simulate an active system.

pricing_strategy.placement: Keep pricing strictly isolated to the 'Owner' and 'Observer' paths. Showing B2B SaaS pricing to a B2C end-client causes confusion and friction.
pricing_strategy.recommendation: Adopt a 2-Tier + Custom model: 'Profissional Solo' (Flat affordable rate) and 'Salão/Barbearia' (Scalable rate based on number of professionals). Include an interactive ROI Slider: 'Quantos agendamentos você perde por faltas mensais?' showing how CutSync pays for itself.

headings.styling: tracking-tight, leading-none, never centered for long text, aggressive contrast.

body.font: Satoshi (or Inter if Satoshi unavailable, but Satoshi preferred)

typography.hierarchy_rules: H1 up to text-6xl. Massive size jumps between H1 and body text to create tension and artful balance.

surfaces.name: Crystal Glassmorphism
surfaces.usage: For the segmentation form overlay and client booking modals.

surfaces.name: Tracing Beam Edge
surfaces.usage: For Owner Dashboard mockups to signify cutting-edge tech.

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay globally to remove digital flatness.

layouts.hero: Full viewport height (100vh) with dramatic typography and slow-zooming premium imagery. Heavy vignette overlay (bg-black/40).
layouts.bento_grid: For featured establishments: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix col-span-8 and col-span-4 to create asymmetry.
layouts.dashboard_preview: Dense, tech-focused grid (grid-cols-3) with tight gaps (gap-4) for the owner metrics.

motion.hero: Slow, cinematic scale-up of background image.
motion.segmentation: Staggered fade-up (Framer Motion) of the 3 choice cards.
motion.booking_modal: Slide up from bottom with scale-down of background page (iOS style app open).

accessibility.testing: All interactive buttons (Agendar, Gerenciar, Observar) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='segment-client-btn').

hero_background.description: Stylish leather chair in a contemporary barbershop, used for the main cinematic hero.

establishment_1.description: Cozy interior design of modern hairdressing studio.

establishment_2.description: Stylist blow-drying a woman's hair in a premium salon.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Not explicitly required unless simulating a 3D salon space. Stick to Framer Motion for high-fidelity 2D UI interactions to keep performance high for booking flows.

instructions_to_main_agent.phase_1: Implement the hero section with a 'Get Started' button that triggers the full-screen Typeform-style segmentation overlay.
instructions_to_main_agent.phase_2: Build the 3 path states: Client View (Bento grid of salons + booking modal), Owner View (Mock dashboard + Pricing), Observer View (Both stacked).
instructions_to_main_agent.phase_3: In the Client View booking modal, ensure the final 'Confirm' click triggers a login gate.
instructions_to_main_agent.phase_4: In the Owner View, create a toggle switch to alternate between Owner stats (revenue, total appointments) and Professional stats (individual agenda).

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Never center align long paragraphs of text.
Use 2-3x more padding than usual (e.g., p-12 or p-16 for main sections).
Ensure all interactive components have micro-animations (hover states).
Do not use generic blue colors; adhere strictly to the Luxury Dark theme provided.
DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds for overlays; always use the specified Crystal Glassmorphism.
Include data-testid on every clickable element.
